chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Second Appeal No.114 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.2359/2025. 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on CMA No.2360/2025. 4. For hearing of main case. 21.01.2026 Bailiff Shamsuddin of this Court present. ------------------------------- As per the order passed on the previous date, office was directed to issue summons by electronic modes to counsel for the appellant, however, the concerned office is present in Court and seeks time to comply with the order. Request is granted. To come up on 06.02.2026 at 8:30 a.m. Late Diary: Mr. Sagheer Ali Solangi, Advocate for the appellant. After passing the above order in Court, the counsel for the appellant appeared and submits that he no longer wishes to proceed with this Second Appeal and seeks its withdrawal. I have perused the vakalatnama which bears the counsel’s signature. In light of the submission made by appellant’s counsel, this Second Appeal is dismissed as withdrawn alongwith listed applications. J U D G E Asif
